narratives.evidence_quote: ऐसे में उसने पीएम मोदी का स्वागत करने के लिए उनसे वरिष्ठ पद पर बैठे राजनेता को भेजा है, जो दिखाता है कि रूस अपन संबंधों में भारत को चीन से अधिक प्राथमिकता देता है।
narratives.reasoning: The text actively praises Russia's diplomatic gesture, interpreting the level of the welcoming official as a sign that Russia prioritizes India over China, which is a positive evaluation of Russia's foreign policy and relationship management.

narratives.evidence_quote: भारत ने इस दौरान रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध को लेकर अपना ये स्टैंड कायम रखा है कि केवल सैन्य माध्यमों से समाधान नहीं निकाला जा सकता। बकौल भारत, ‘ग्लोबल साउथ’ का भी मानना है कि कूटनीति व बातचीत से ही समस्या का समाधान निकलेगा, युद्धक्षेत्र में नहीं।
narratives.reasoning: The text presents India's stance that a solution cannot be found through military means alone, implicitly criticizing the Western-led support for Ukraine's military defense and promoting diplomacy as the only viable path, which discredits the current Western diplomatic and military approach to the conflict.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russia has international support from a number of countries and people
subnarratives.evidence_quote: ऐसे में उसने पीएम मोदी का स्वागत करने के लिए उनसे वरिष्ठ पद पर बैठे राजनेता को भेजा है, जो दिखाता है कि रूस अपन संबंधों में भारत को चीन से अधिक प्राथमिकता देता है।
subnarratives.reasoning: The text actively promotes the idea that Russia is valued and prioritized by a major global power (India), suggesting Russia enjoys significant international support and prestige in its diplomatic relations.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: शीत युद्ध के समय से ही भारत-रूस के संबंध अच्छे हैं, साथ ही रूस भारत को सबसे अधिक हथियार सप्लाई करने वाले देशों में भी शामिल है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement praises Russia's long-standing, positive relationship with India and its role as a key defense supplier, which supports the general 'Praise of Russia' narrative but does not fit any of the more specific subnarrative definitions provided.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Diplomacy does/will not work
subnarratives.evidence_quote: भारत ने इस दौरान रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध को लेकर अपना ये स्टैंड कायम रखा है कि केवल सैन्य माध्यमों से समाधान नहीं निकाला जा सकता।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly discredits the Western approach to the Ukraine war, which heavily involves military support for Ukraine, by stating that a solution cannot be found through military means alone. This undermines the efficacy of the West's primary strategy and promotes the idea that their chosen path (supporting military resistance) is futile, aligning with the subnarrative that diplomacy (as an alternative) is being dismissed or that the West's approach is ineffective.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: बकौल भारत, ‘ग्लोबल साउथ’ का भाी मानना है कि कूटनीति व बातचीत से ही समस्या का समाधान निकलेगा, युद्धक्षेत्र में नहीं।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement positions India and the 'Global South' as the proponents of the correct, peaceful diplomatic path (dialogue and diplomacy), implicitly contrasting it with the West's approach, which is framed as reliant on the 'battlefield'. This serves to discredit Western diplomacy and strategy by presenting it as inferior or misguided compared to the stance of the Global South, supporting the parent narrative but not fitting neatly into the other specific subnarrative definitions provided.
